---
title: "Runyu Luo"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:luorunyu54@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/luo-runyu/

---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
